data.name: Santa Girl
data.detailed_description:
🎅 Santa Girl isn’t just a puzzle game. It’s your personal journey into the night fantasies of a seductive Santa — a girl who visits only those who’ve been very, very naughty.

She’s gentle, playful, and a little dangerous. There’s a spark of temptation in her eyes and the warmth of a winter night in her touch. And if you truly deserve a gift, she’ll show you what’s hidden beneath her red costume…

While Santa is giving out presents, she’s unwrapping your desires piece by piece — and it’s up to you to put them back together, step by step, fragment by fragment.
There’s no punishment here — only pleasure, soft breathing, and the sweet thrill of anticipation.

🔞 Game Features:

🎁 30 seductive levels — each puzzle reveals a new scene, hotter, deeper, more intimate than the last.
💫 30 achievements — from your first encounter to the full revelation of her desires.
🖼️ Gallery of delights — save your favorite moments and return to them whenever you wish.

In Santa Girl, you set the pace of your pleasure:

💖 Easy mode — a gentle introduction, soft touches, the perfect warm-up before the main show.
🔥 Medium mode — more details, more intrigue, more temptation.
💎 Hard mode — a true challenge for the most persistent. Every fragment brings you closer to the climax.

Each level is a new breath, a new fantasy, a new night when Santa Girl comes only for you.
She won’t leave a gift in your stocking — because she herself is the gift. 🎁

data.short_description: Santa Girl — a hot puzzle where each level ignites her temptation and your imagination🎁
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 越南文*, 希臘文*, 丹麥文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 荷蘭文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 匈牙利文*, 烏克蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 捷克文*, 瑞典文*, 日文*, 印尼語*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 10
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Quad-core processor with 3.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1050 or AMD Radeon RX 560 with 4 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 11 or newer
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
